commit_scope: Resolve literal source-map drift around named Form/BML/emitted-C symbols by teaching wellness symbol resolution the declaration shapes already used in the repo, adding a literal platforms row to the standard receipt, and regenerating stale repository indexes.
evidence_refs: Before this change, make wellness reported 13 active target symbols pending even though IFormFilesystem, IPlatformHostCarrier, HostResourceObservable, port, act, sense, prim, and inflate already existed in their source files.
scripts/wellness_check.py now recognizes BML interface and enum declarations, parenthesized Form defn declarations, and emitted static C function declarations inside Form emitter payloads.
docs/coherence-substrate/standard-receipt.form now has a literal form platforms row for the mac, windows, and android receipt evidence references.
api/tests/test_edge_cases_regression.py includes a synthetic repo regression proving BML interface, Form defn, emitted-C fk_walk, and form platforms symbols resolve.
make wellness now reports every claimed symbol resolves in its file: 1061 symbols across 130 specs checked.
python3 scripts/generate_repo_indexes.py repaired stale scripts, specs, and manifest indexes after wellness reported specs/INDEX.md drift.

local_validation.notes: Initial make prompt-guide failed on continuity because a sibling Codex worktree was locally ahead/no-upstream after squash merge; the prompt guide itself allowed PROMPT_GATE_SKIP_CONTINUITY=1 for this temporary bypass. The focused pytest passed with existing deprecation warnings only.

ci_validation.notes: CI has not run yet for this branch.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is passing; PR CI and merge validation remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Wellness no longer reports already-realized Form/BML/emitted-C symbols as active pending target symbols. The larger active specs remain active, but their source symbol rows now reflect what is literally present.
test_flows: make wellness reports every claimed symbol resolves in its file.
The targeted regression test resolves BML interface, Form defn, emitted-C fk_walk, and standard-receipt platforms rows in a synthetic repo.
